response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced software developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and focus on advanced technologies (e.g., AI agents, high-performance systems) may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level role. His expertise in TypeScript, React, and databases is a strong fit, but the role's emphasis on pragmatic, scalable solutions in renewable energy/construction tech may not fully utilize his skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, directly relevant to the role.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and integrating diverse data sources (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz).
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling, demonstrating initiative and technical depth.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role; may seek more senior responsibilities or challenges.
Limited explicit experience with PostgreSQL (preferred in the role) and AWS services (nice-to-have).
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current hybrid/remote-friendly background.
